initializeCommand: if [ ! -d ${localEnv:HOME}/.ssh ]; then mkdir -p ${localEnv:HOME}/.ssh; fi; if [ ! -d ${localEnv:HOME}/.gnupg ]; then mkdir -p ${localEnv:HOME}/.gnupg; fi
postStartCommand: bash -i -c '(echo ""> /root/.gnupg/common.conf;gpg --import ~/.gnupg_wsl/gpg-keys-export.asc || echo "On WSL host run: gpg --armor --export-secret-keys GPG_KEY_NAME > ~/.gnupg/gpg-keys-export.asc")'
